description.ko: 날씨와 데이터가 융합되어 거대한 사이버펑크 대도시 속에서 반사적이고 낭만적인 분위기를 자아내는 테크 누아르 풍경입니다.
description.en: A sprawling tech-noir landscape where weather and data merge, creating a reflective, romantic atmosphere within a dense cyberpunk metropolis.

prompt: A cinematic wide shot of NEON-V, titled 'The Silicon Rainfall.' A perspective looking down a massive cyberpunk thoroughfare where towering #1A0033 indigo skyscrapers are saturated with #FF00FF magenta neon advertisements. A torrential holographic rain creates #00FFFF cyan pixel-ripples on the wet metallic asphalt, reflecting the city's verticality. High-speed maglev vehicles leave long, vibrant #FF6B35 orange light trails that cut through dense, smoky volumetric fog. Hyper-detailed tech-noir textures, flickering lens flares, and ray-traced puddle reflections. 8k resolution, capturing the urban romanticism and lonely scale of a neon-soaked future.
